APPEARANCES: Benny Martin, Esq. of Law Office of Benny Martin 558-1760 for pltf & moving party (did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of his intent to appear at the hearing); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion is Denied without prejudice. Motion must be served with 16 court days notice plus 5 calendar days for service by mail. C.C.P. section 1005(B).
